text: Hi. My name is Claire, and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance, and we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote. May I ask, are you under the age of 80? My what? Sorry, I didn't catch that. Just to confirm really quick, are you under the age of 80? I'm 80 years old. Great. I will now transfer you to a specialist to discuss your premium savings options. Hold just a moment. Hi. See Jimmy from U.S. AutoCare. How are you doing today? Hello? Yes, ma'am. This is about our insurance course. We have our mobile. No, don't ask the caller.
